hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$(basename "$f")" in .env*) jq -n --arg r "Blocked: .env files hold secrets. Edit them manually outside the assistant, not via Edit/Write/MultiEdit." '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:$r}}'; exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in *drizzle/meta/*) jq -n --arg r "Blocked: drizzle/meta/** is generated by \`npm run db:generate\`. Edit schema.ts and regenerate instead of hand-editing this file." '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:$r}}'; exit 0;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // (.tool_response.filePath // empty)'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) : ;; *) exit 0;; esac; out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg out "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Typecheck found errors after this edit:\n" + $out)}}'; fi
